Patch Set 3:

The issue here is that JJB is configured to run all jobs if any file within repo is altered:

      files: '**'

in https://git.onap.org/ci-management/tree/jjb/integration/simulators/integration-pnf-simulator.yaml#n11

and it seems there is no "exclude-file" mechanism...

Since we can't override the VBJ flag here manually we have to fix the maven build.

Bartosz Gardziejewski, Joanna Jeremicz, Krzysztof Gajewski - could you please fix the netconfsimulator build (in separate PR, we'll rebase then)?

It's failing with:

"Access denied to: https://dl.bintray.com/palantir/releases/com/palantir/docker/compose/docker-compose-rule-junit4/0.34.0/docker-compose-rule-junit4-0.34.0.pom , ReasonPhrase:Forbidden. -> [Help 1]"

Patch Set 3:

I've created Jira for that https://jira.onap.org/browse/INT-1973

Feel free to reassign to yourself

Patch Set 3:

This MR should fix the build: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/integration/simulators/pnf-simulator/+/123923
